data.content: Implementation review approved. The diff adds min-w-[20ch] to both the SearchBarInner form and its Suspense fallback in search-bar.tsx, preventing the search control from shrinking below 20 characters. The app-header.tsx flex-wrap layout already supports wrapping when space is tight—no changes needed there. A new layout-contract test locks in the 20ch minimum and the header wrapping classes. Clean, minimal, focused change with no regressions.
